title: nf-core/drop pipeline - params.gene_annotation schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.gene_annotation

name.errorMessage: Name must be provided and cannot contain spaces
name.description: Unique identifier for the gene annotation. Must not contain spaces.

gtf.errorMessage: The GTF file has to exist, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.gtf' or '.gtf.gz'
gtf.description: Path to the GTF file. Must exist and cannot contain spaces.
